info.name: Waselak POS API
info.description: Complete API collection for Waselak POS system — multi-business-type support (RESTAURANT, CAFE, RETAIL, GROCERY) with order channels, tax, discounts, stock enforcement, and more.

item.name: Enums & Constants Reference
item.description: Complete reference of all enum types and constants used in the Waselak POS API. These are NOT executable requests — they serve as documentation you can browse inside Postman.

request.description:
## business_type — Vendor Business Type

Used in: `POST /admin/vendors`, `PUT /admin/vendors/:id`, `PUT /vendors/me`

| Value | Description | Auto-Config |
|-------|-------------|-------------|
| `RESTAURANT` | Full-service restaurant (default) | tables=true, dine_in=true, delivery=true, takeaway=true, in_store=false, pickup_later=false, tax=false, stock=NONE |
| `CAFE` | Coffee shop / cafe | tables=true, dine_in=true, delivery=true, takeaway=true, in_store=false, pickup_later=false, tax=false, stock=NONE |
| `RETAIL` | Retail store (clothing, electronics, etc.) | tables=false, dine_in=false, delivery=false, takeaway=true, in_store=true, pickup_later=true, tax=true(14%), stock=ENFORCE |
| `GROCERY` | Grocery / supermarket | tables=false, dine_in=false, delivery=true, takeaway=true, in_store=true, pickup_later=true, tax=true(14%), stock=ENFORCE |

## channel — Order Channel

Used in: `POST /orders` (channel field), `GET /orders?channel=`

| Value | Used By | Description |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `DINE_IN` | Restaurant, Cafe | Customer eats at a table |
| `DELIVERY` | Restaurant, Cafe, Grocery | Order delivered to customer address |
| `TAKEAWAY` | All business types | Customer picks up immediately |
| `IN_STORE` | Retail, Grocery | Walk-in purchase, instant completion |
| `PICKUP_LATER` | Retail, Grocery | Customer orders now, picks up later |

## order status — All Values

Used in: `PATCH /orders/:id/status`, `GET /orders?status=`

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `CREATED` | Order just placed |
| `IN_PREPARATION` | Kitchen/staff preparing |
| `READY` | Ready for pickup/serve/delivery |
| `SERVED` | Dine-in only: served to table |
| `ASSIGNED` | Delivery only: assigned to driver |
| `OUT_FOR_DELIVERY` | Delivery only: driver on the way |
| `DELIVERED` | Delivery only: arrived to customer |
| `DELIVERY_FAILED` | Delivery only: couldn't reach customer |
| `RETURNED` | Order returned to store |
| `PICKED_UP` | Takeaway/Pickup: customer collected |
| `COMPLETED` | Final: order done |
| `CANCELED` | Final: order cancelled |

## DINE_IN Order Status Flow

```
CREATED → IN_PREPARATION → READY → SERVED → COMPLETED
                                              ↘ CANCELED (from any)
```

Valid transitions:
- `CREATED` → `IN_PREPARATION` or `CANCELED`
- `IN_PREPARATION` → `READY` or `CANCELED`
- `READY` → `SERVED` or `CANCELED`
- `SERVED` → `COMPLETED` or `CANCELED`

## DELIVERY Order Status Flow

```
CREATED → IN_PREPARATION → READY → ASSIGNED → OUT_FOR_DELIVERY → DELIVERED → COMPLETED
                                                    ↓
                                             DELIVERY_FAILED → RETURNED
                                                    ↓
                                                ASSIGNED (retry)
                                              ↘ CANCELED (from any)
```

Valid transitions:
- `CREATED` → `IN_PREPARATION` or `CANCELED`
- `IN_PREPARATION` → `READY` or `CANCELED`
- `READY` → `ASSIGNED` or `CANCELED`
- `ASSIGNED` → `OUT_FOR_DELIVERY` or `CANCELED`
- `OUT_FOR_DELIVERY` → `DELIVERED` or `DELIVERY_FAILED` or `CANCELED`
- `DELIVERED` → `COMPLETED`
- `DELIVERY_FAILED` → `RETURNED` or `ASSIGNED` (retry)

## TAKEAWAY Order Status Flow

```
CREATED → IN_PREPARATION → READY → PICKED_UP → COMPLETED
                                              ↘ CANCELED (from any)
```

Valid transitions:
- `CREATED` → `IN_PREPARATION` or `CANCELED`
- `IN_PREPARATION` → `READY` or `CANCELED`
- `READY` → `PICKED_UP` or `CANCELED`
- `PICKED_UP` → `COMPLETED`

## IN_STORE Order Status Flow

```
CREATED → COMPLETED
   ↘ CANCELED
```

Simplest flow — walk-in purchase, completes immediately.

Valid transitions:
- `CREATED` → `COMPLETED` or `CANCELED`

## PICKUP_LATER Order Status Flow

```
CREATED → IN_PREPARATION → READY → PICKED_UP → COMPLETED
                                              ↘ CANCELED (from any)
```

Same flow as TAKEAWAY.

Valid transitions:
- `CREATED` → `IN_PREPARATION` or `CANCELED`
- `IN_PREPARATION` → `READY` or `CANCELED`
- `READY` → `PICKED_UP` or `CANCELED`
- `PICKED_UP` → `COMPLETED`

## payment_status

Used in: `PATCH /orders/:id/payment-status`, `GET /orders`

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `PENDING` | Payment not yet received |
| `PAID` | Fully paid |
| `PARTIALLY_PAID` | Partial payment received |
| `REFUNDED` | Payment refunded |
| `FAILED` | Payment attempt failed |

## payment_method

Used in: `POST /orders`, `PUT /orders/:id`

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `CASH` | Cash payment |
| `CARD` | Credit/debit card |
| `WALLET` | Mobile wallet (e.g. Vodafone Cash) |

## payment_timing

Used in: `POST /orders`

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `PAY_NOW` | Pay at order time (default) |
| `PAY_LATER` | Pay on delivery/pickup |

## discount_type

Used in: `POST /orders`, `PUT /orders/:id`

| Value | Description | Example |
|-------|-------------|--------|
| `FIXED` | Flat amount discount | 10 EGP off total |
| `PERCENT` | Percentage discount | 5% off subtotal |

## stock_mode

Used in: `POST /admin/vendors`, `PUT /admin/vendors/:id`, `PUT /vendors/me`

| Value | Description | Default For |
|-------|-------------|-------------|
| `NONE` | No stock checking | RESTAURANT, CAFE |
| `WARN` | Allow order but warn when low stock | — |
| `ENFORCE` | Block order if insufficient stock | RETAIL, GROCERY |

## salary_type

Used in: `POST /workers`, `PUT /workers/:id`

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `DAILY` | Worker paid daily (salary auto-generated on login) |
| `MONTHLY` | Worker paid monthly |

## user role (login role)

Used in: `POST /users`, `POST /auth/login` (app_type validation)

| Value | Apps Allowed | Description |
|-------|-------------|-------------|
| `MANAGER` | Manager + Cashier + Delivery | Full access to all 3 apps |
| `CASHIER` | Cashier only | Can only login to Cashier app |
| `DELIVERY` | Delivery only | Can only login to Delivery app |

**Login validation by app_type:**
- `app_type: MANAGER` → only `MANAGER` role can login
- `app_type: CASHIER` → `CASHIER` or `MANAGER` can login
- `app_type: DELIVERY` → `DELIVERY` or `MANAGER` can login

## table status

Used in: `PATCH /tables/:id/status`, `GET /tables?status=`

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `AVAILABLE` | Table is free |
| `OCCUPIED` | Table has active diners |
| `RESERVED` | Table is reserved |

## stock transaction type

Used in: `GET /stock/:id/transactions`, `GET /stock/analytics/transactions?type=`

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `ADD` | Stock quantity increased (manual restock) |
| `DEDUCT` | Stock quantity decreased (manual deduction or order) |
| `ADJUST` | Stock quantity corrected/adjusted |

## attendance auth_method

Used in: Attendance records (auto-set based on check-in endpoint used)

| Value | Endpoint | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| `MANUAL` | `POST /attendance/check-in` | Manager manually checks in worker |
| `PIN` | `POST /attendance/check-in/pin` | Worker enters their PIN |
| `QR` | `POST /attendance/check-in/qr` | Worker scans QR code |
| `AUTO` | — | Auto check-in on login (if worker linked to user) |

## salary period_type

Used in: `GET /salary-payments?period_type=`

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `DAY` | Daily salary period (for DAILY salary_type workers) |
| `MONTH` | Monthly salary period (for MONTHLY salary_type workers) |

## announcement target_type

Used in: `POST /announcements`

| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `ALL` | Announcement visible to all users |
| `CASHIER` | Only visible to CASHIER role users |
| `DELIVERY` | Only visible to DELIVERY role users |
DEPRECATED: Public registration is no longer available. This endpoint returns 410 Gone. Use POST /api/v1/admin/vendors instead (requires X-Admin-Password header).

item.name: Create Order

  "customer_id": null,

  "client_phone": "01000000002",
  "client_address": null,
  "geo_lat": null,

    }

}

item.description:
Create a new order. Channels: DINE_IN, DELIVERY, TAKEAWAY, IN_STORE, PICKUP_LATER.
Discount types: FIXED (flat amount) or PERCENT (percentage of subtotal).
Tax is calculated after discount (percentage-based on all channels).
Stock enforcement: If vendor stock_mode is ENFORCE, will block if insufficient stock.

{

  "delivery_fee": 0.0,

  "discount_type": "PERCENT",
  "tax_place_id": null,
  "notes": null,
  "items": [
    {
      "item_id": "<item-uuid>",
      "quantity": 1,
      "note": null
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Create a delivery order. If delivery_fee is 0 or omitted, vendor's default_delivery_fee is used automatically. Delivery fee is ONLY applied to DELIVERY channel orders.

item.name: Update Order Status
item.description:
Status flow: CREATED → PREPARING → READY → COMPLETED
Delivery: CREATED → PREPARING → READY → ASSIGNED → OUT_FOR_DELIVERY → DELIVERED → COMPLETED
Any status → CANCELED

item.name: Update Payment Status

request.description:
Update payment status. When marking as PAID, optionally specify payment_method (CASH, CARD, WALLET) to record how customer paid.

IMPORTANT: Orders cannot be marked COMPLETED until payment_status is PAID.

item.description: Valid statuses: PENDING, PAID, PARTIALLY_PAID, REFUNDED, FAILED

request.description:
Confirm payment for a PAY_LATER order. Choose the payment method (CASH, CARD, WALLET) at time of payment.

This must be called BEFORE the order can be marked as COMPLETED.

Flow for PAY_LATER:
1. Create order with payment_timing: PAY_LATER
2. Process order through statuses (IN_PREPARATION → READY → etc.)
3. When customer pays: PATCH /payment-status with {payment_status: PAID, payment_method: CASH}
4. Now the order can be marked COMPLETED

request.description: Create a new RESTAURANT vendor with manager user. Channel flags are auto-configured from business_type if omitted.
Create CAFE vendor (minimal). Auto-configures: tables=true, dine_in=true, delivery=true, takeaway=true, in_store=false, pickup_later=false, tax=false, stock=NONE.
Create RETAIL vendor (minimal). Auto-configures: tables=false, dine_in=false, delivery=false, takeaway=true, in_store=true, pickup_later=true, tax=true(14%), stock=ENFORCE.
Create GROCERY vendor (minimal). Auto-configures: tables=false, dine_in=false, delivery=true, takeaway=true, in_store=true, pickup_later=true, tax=true(14%), stock=ENFORCE.
List all vendors with user counts. Returns AdminVendorResponse[] including suspension status.
Get a single vendor by UUID. Returns full AdminVendorResponse with suspension status.

request.description: Update any vendor fields. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.
Suspend a vendor. Suspended vendors cannot: login, refresh tokens, or update their own profile via PUT /vendors/me.
Unsuspend a vendor — restores login, token refresh, and self-update capabilities.

DANGER: Permanently deletes a vendor and ALL associated data (orders, items, categories, tables, users, workers, attendance, salaries, stock, customers, announcements, etc.). This action cannot be undone.
